summary: Comprehensive testing of Transferencias Linea (Internal Transfers between Business Lines) feature. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: page loads, sidebar link present, filters work, create modal with FIFO estimation, detail modal with traceability, confirm and cancel flows.
features_verified: GET /api/transferencias-linea - List transfers with pagination - PASS
GET /api/transferencias-linea?estado=BORRADOR - Filter by estado BORRADOR - PASS
GET /api/transferencias-linea?estado=CONFIRMADO - Filter by estado CONFIRMADO - PASS
GET /api/transferencias-linea/stock-por-linea/{item_id} - Stock breakdown by business line - PASS
GET /api/transferencias-linea/estimar-costo - FIFO cost estimation before creating - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea - Create draft transfer - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea - Validation: linea_origen != linea_destino - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea - Validation: item must exist - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea - Validation: cantidad > 0 - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea - Validation: cantidad <= stock disponible - PASS
GET /api/transferencias-linea/{id} - Get transfer detail with FIFO layers - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/confirmar - Confirm transfer (atomic FIFO operation) - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/confirmar - Cannot confirm already confirmed - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/cancelar - Cancel draft with motivo - PASS
POST /api/transferencias-linea/{id}/cancelar - Cannot cancel confirmed transfer - PASS
GET /api/lineas-negocio - List business lines for dropdown - PASS
GET /api/inventario?all=true - List items for dropdown - PASS
Frontend: Page /inventario/transferencias-linea loads correctly - PASS
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Transferencias' under 'INVENTARIO FIFO' section - PASS
Frontend: Table displays transfers with proper columns - PASS
Frontend: Search filter works - PASS
Frontend: Estado filter works - PASS
Frontend: Nueva Transferencia modal opens - PASS
Frontend: Item selection loads stock por linea table - PASS
Frontend: FIFO cost estimation displays capas and totals - PASS
Frontend: Detail modal shows transfer info and FIFO traceability - PASS
Frontend: Confirm button available for BORRADOR transfers - PASS
Frontend: Cancel button available for BORRADOR transfers - PASS
seed_data_creation: Created test transfers during testing: TRF-20260406-003 (CONFIRMADO), TRF-20260406-004 (CANCELADO), TRF-20260406-005 (BORRADOR)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transferencias Linea feature fully tested. Key test data: item_id=d402f7c9-9c4c-4a05-8f43-7589288828b0 (Cierre YKK #5 Metal), lineas: 26 (Pantalon denim), 27 (Polo), 28 (Pantalon Qepo). Existing confirmed transfer TRF-20260406-001 moved 50 units with costo_total=468.50. FIFO traceability working: detalles array contains ingreso_origen_id, ingreso_destino_id, cantidad, costo_unitario. Tables: prod_transferencias_linea (master), prod_transferencias_linea_detalle (FIFO traceability). prod_inventario_salidas has tipo='TRANSFERENCIA' column.
